# Test parallelogram stall geometry at 45° angle.
# Verifies that aisle-side corners sit on the face edge
# and divider lines run at the stall angle.

polygon outer
0,0
750,0
750,500
0,500
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

set stall-angle=45
----
set stall_angle_deg=45

generate
----
total_stalls: 830

screenshot
----

# With islands disabled — isolate stall paint lines from island outlines.
layers islands=off
----
layers updated

screenshot stall-parallelogram-no-islands.png
----
